build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(30, 30, 5)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(12.5).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature for bolt holes — .workplane(offset=5).rect(4, 4).extrude(5)
STEP 4: Position bolt holes — .faces("<X").workplane(centered=True).moveTo(-8, -8).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()
STEP 5: Add additional raised feature for bolt holes — .faces("<Y").workplane(centered=True).moveTo(8, -8).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()
STEP 6: Add additional raised feature for bolt holes — .faces(">X").workplane(centered=True).moveTo(-8, 8).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()
STEP 7: Add additional raised feature for bolt holes — .faces("<Y").workplane(centered=True).moveTo(8, 8).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()
